set.body: Every orphan benchmark script gets rehabilitated into the tools/benchmark-regression.R harness (or an equivalent harness-compliant entry point). No deletions by default. Each script must: (1) expose a callable entry point, (2) register its ops in the harness dispatch table, (3) skip gracefully on missing backends (requireNamespace), (4) follow the standard timer/priming convention from benchmark-helpers.R, (5) emit per-rep sd/CI and accuracy check, (6) have baseline rows in baseline.csv, (7) run cleanly in nightly-stress.yaml. Scripts grouped by domain (QR, SVD, Cholesky, dense products, sparse, iterative, flagship, stats models, graph/OT). Each group becomes a child ticket.
set.title: Rehabilitate 23 orphan benchmark scripts into the harness
